description: Replaces the retired scripts/sync-from-rendering.sh: instead of vendoring a fresh rendering payload, Renovate moves the single FS.GG.UI.Template version pin (providers/rendering.providers.yml + README) when Rendering publishes a new package. This structurally retires the FsSkiaUiVersion staleness class for this repo.

packageRules.description: Treat the FS.GG.UI.* set as one coherent snapshot: group any updates and rewrite the pinned value (rangeStrategy:bump) rather than widening a range. Currently only FS.GG.UI.Template is referenced (via the customManager below); the glob also covers any future FS.GG.UI.* package references added to this repo.

customManagers.description: Detect the FS.GG.UI.Template version pinned in the rendering provider descriptor and the README, in every surrounding form (`::`, `@`, `/v`). Renovate updates all matched occurrences for the dependency together, preserving the pin coherence that tests/composition/run.sh enforces.
